Title: Virtual Staging AI
Description: AI-powered virtual staging for empty rooms. Upload photo → get staged versions in 30 sec. Pay per image. MLS-compliant output.
ShortDescription: Instant virtual staging for empty rooms. $5/image.

Title: Restb.ai
Description: Computer vision AI that analyzes property photos to auto-generate listing descriptions, extract features, and score photo quality.
ShortDescription: Auto-generate listing descriptions from photos. Free tier available.

Title: Ylopo
Description: AI-powered digital marketing platform for real estate. Facebook/Google ads, landing pages, CRM integration, and predictive lead scoring.

Title: Structurely
Description: AI conversational assistant (Aisa Holmes) that engages leads via text/email, qualifies them, and books appointments 24/7.
ShortDescription: AI assistant that qualifies leads & books appointments 24/7.

Title: HouseCanary
Description: AI-powered property valuation, market forecasts, and investment analytics. Used by top brokerages and institutional investors.

Title: BrightMLS AI
Description: MLS-integrated AI tools for pricing recommendations, market trends, and buyer/seller reports. Included with Bright MLS subscription.

Title: Sidekick
Description: AI CRM assistant that automates follow-ups, writes emails, schedules tasks, and predicts which contacts need attention.

Title: Follow Up Boss
Description: Popular CRM with AI-powered action plans, smart lists, and automated communication workflows. Built for real estate teams.
ShortDescription: CRM with AI action plans & smart automation.
KeyFeatures: AI action plans,Smart lists,Auto workflows,Team collaboration

Title: ChatGPT for Real Estate
Description: Custom GPTs and prompts for listing descriptions, emails, social media, market reports, and client communications. Requires ChatGPT Plus.
ShortDescription: AI writing assistant for all real estate content.

Title: Jasper AI
Description: AI content platform with real estate templates for listings, blogs, social posts, emails, and video scripts. Brand voice training.

Title: REimagineHome
Description: AI virtual staging, renovation visualization, and landscape design. Upload photo → see furnished/renovated versions instantly.

Title: Matterport
Description: 3D digital twins for properties. AI-powered measurement, floor plans, and virtual tours. Hardware + software.
ShortDescription: 3D digital twins & virtual tours with AI measurements.

Title: DealCheck
Description: Property analysis for flips, rentals, BRRRR. AI rent estimates, expense forecasting, and ROI projections. Mobile + web.

Title: RealtyMogul
Description: Commercial real estate investment platform with AI-powered deal screening, underwriting, and portfolio analytics.
ShortDescription: Commercial RE investment platform with AI screening.

Title: DocuSign AI
Description: AI-powered document review, clause extraction, and compliance checking for real estate contracts and disclosures.
ShortDescription: AI contract review & compliance for transactions.

Title: Skyslope
Description: Transaction management with AI document audit, compliance checking, and broker review automation. Popular with brokerages.
KeyFeatures: AI doc audit,Compliance check,Broker workflow,Digital signatures
